text: How comfortable are you writing code from scratch?

options: making things look beautiful and visual

text: When you encounter a dataset, you feel…
options: interested in data if it helps the project
curious about the story hiding in the data
a polished product people love using
elegant code that solves a real problem
a report that changes a decision
a system that never goes down

text: In a team, you naturally drift toward…
options: talking to users and shaping the vision
building the infrastructure everyone depends on

text: How do you prefer to work?
options: a mix of analysis and discussion

text: Which of these tools sounds most appealing?
When a project goes sideways, you tend to…
options: debug alone until it is fixed
dig into the data to find the root cause

text: How drawn are you to visual design?
options: visual design is not my area
functional is fine, polish is a bonus
I appreciate visual design but do not lead it
visual design is my happy place
users loving the product I helped build
insights that drive real business impact
